mapper.select: select SEQ as seq , division , subject , created_at as createdAt , updated_at as updatedAt , deleted_at as deletedAt , trashed_at as trashedAt , time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , file_new_nm as fileNewNm , file_conv_nm as fileConvNm , remark , file_size_bytes as fileSizeBytes , TC_USER_SEQ as tcUserSeq , status , stt_started_at as sttStartedAt , stt_duration as sttDuration , reliability , click_least_once as clickLeastOnce , error_message as errorMessage from TB_CS_SOUND WHERE SEQ > 0 AND created_at BETWEEN str_to_date(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY ) and SEQ >= #{from} and SEQ <= #{to} AND deleted_at is null AND trashed_at is null order by created_at

select SEQ as seq , subject , created_at as createdAt , updated_at as updatedAt , deleted_at as deletedAt , trashed_at as trashedAt , time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , file_new_nm as fileNewNm , file_conv_nm as fileConvNm , remark , file_size_bytes as fileSizeBytes , TC_USER_SEQ as tcUserSeq from TB_CS_MEETING WHERE SEQ > 0 AND created_at BETWEEN str_to_date(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY ) and SEQ >= #{from} and SEQ <= #{to} AND deleted_at is null AND trashed_at is null order by created_at
mapper.update: update TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION set data_id = '' , use_yn = 'N' , sound_seq = -1 where SEQ = #{seq}
mapper.select: select SEQ as seq , start , end , reliability , stt_text as sttText , meet_text as meetText , train_text as trainText , meeting_seq as meetingSeq , sound_seq as soundSeqtranscription , use_yn as useYn , data_id as dataId , created_at as createdAt , updated_at as updatedAt from TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION order by SEQ

select SEQ as seq , subject , created_at as createdAt , updated_at as updatedAt , deleted_at as deletedAt , trashed_at as trashedAt , time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , file_new_nm as fileNewNm , file_conv_nm as fileConvNm , remark , file_size_bytes as fileSizeBytes , TC_USER_SEQ as tcUserSeq from TB_CS_TEST WHERE SEQ > 0 AND trashed_at is null order by SEQ

select SEQ as seq , start , end , reliability , stt_text as sttText , meet_text as meetText , train_text as trainText , test_seq as testSeq , -1 as meetingSeq , -1 as soundSeq , use_yn as useYn , data_id as dataId , created_at as createdAt , updated_at as updatedAt from TB_CS_TEST_TRANS order by seq
